Yield distribution.

Compare current Core behavior from the same surface before opening the app.

Core Current APY 30D Change Liquidity
Balanced 9.8% +0.4% High
Cashflow 7.4% +0.1% High
Liquid Staking 8.1% -0.2% High
Boost 14.2% +1.2% Medium

Risk is part of the read.

Stats should make risk easier to compare: liquidity depth, source concentration, APY movement, and strategy type stay visible before a user allocates.

Audit status belongs with product context.

Protocol and source-level review should sit next to the metrics it affects, so users can evaluate a Core from yield, composition, and verification together.

SolStacker

SolStacker organizes Solana yield into curated Cores, helping users allocate, accumulate, and track yield from one Account.
